title: diplazium novoguineense
intro: Diplazium novoguineense is a species of fern commonly known as the New Guinea celandine or New Guinea polypody, which belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The medicinal properties of Diplazium novoguineense include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In traditional herbal preparations, Diplazium novoguineense is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
